nasb.text: The Philistine also said to David, “Come to me, and I will give your flesh to the birds of the sky and the beasts of the field.”

esv.text: The Philistine said to David, “Come to me, and I will give your flesh to the birds of the air and to the beasts of the field.”

cnv.text: 那非利士人又對大衛說：“你到我這裡來吧！我要把你的肉給空中的飛鳥和田野的走獸吃。”

ccb.text: 又说：“你过来，我要把你的肉丢给天上的飞禽和地上的走兽。”
